title: Bburago Die-Cast MASSEY FERGUSSON 8740S TRACTOR - Replica Collectible Toy Model - 1:50 Scale, Red
features: An absolutely incredible collectible die cast model. A highly detailed replica where no details are overlooked. Spinning rubber wheels and authentic moving parts make this the ultimate addition to any collection.
An authentic reproduction, about 10 cm long, made from a heavy duty, durable Zinc alloy and ABS resins. Exact and precision decoration and livery add to its authenticity and realism.
Made with exacting and meticulous craftsmanship with an eye to precise tolerances, these die-cast replicas capture the realistic essence of the vehicle.
Collect, display or simply play, Bburago diecast models deliver the realism, authenticity and real-world feel demanded by today’s buyer.
Meets and exceeds all UK, EU and US testing standards, a perfect gift for boys and girls ages 3 +
description: Product Description Discover the exquisite world of Bburago Die-Cast Vehicle Model Collectibles, where precision meets passion. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, these miniature marvels are a testament to automotive artistry. From iconic sports cars and classic vintage beauties to construction trucks and emergency vehicles, each model is a masterpiece in its own right. The entire range consists of incredibly detailed replicas with free spinning rubber wheels and accurate moving parts. Whether you're a die-hard collector, an admirer of fine craftsmanship or simply looking for a new addition to the toy chest with great play value, Bburago's range offers something for every enthusiast. Elevate your collection with these stunning, authentic replicas, and let your love for automobiles shine through every meticulously sculpted curve and line. Bbrurago is brought to you by One For Fun Toys, an industry leading manufacturer and distributor of toys, impulse items and collectibles. For almost 50 years we have offered high-quality, innovative and safe products that engage and enthrall children and adults alike. We strive to promote creativity, discovery, entertainment and imagination with products designed to delight and engineered to endure. From Impulse to Games, Plush to Outdoor, Figurines to Playsets. Along with Bburago, One For Fun offers Tobar and HGL toys, OzBozz Ride-ons and Maisto Collectible Diecast. Safety Warning Small parts, chocking hazzard.
